//: For when Elemancer is opened as its own folder. The copy that VS Code actually reads for the Desktop/Claude workspace lives at that workspace's root .vscode/.
//statusbar: Status-bar buttons via the 'Tasks' extension (actboy168.tasks). Hidden by default; each button below opts in with options.statusbar. Standard VS Code ignores the statusbar key (it may show a harmless schema hint until the extension is installed).

tasks.label: Elemancer: Build
tasks.detail: Compile with Ninja (default build task, Ctrl+Shift+B)

tasks.label: Elemancer: Run
tasks.detail: Build, then launch the interactive window

tasks.label: Elemancer: Test (headless)
tasks.detail: Run the solver check, prints SIMTEST ... PASS/FAIL

statusbar.label: $(beaker) Test
statusbar.tooltip: Build & run the headless solver check (SIMTEST PASS/FAIL)

tasks.label: Elemancer: Shot (headless capture)
tasks.detail: Render one frame with no window to shot.bmp

statusbar.label: $(device-camera) Shot
statusbar.tooltip: Render one headless frame to shot.bmp
